name: Chocolate Thins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup C and H Powdered Sugar (unsifted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the powdered sugar, flour, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add the salad oil, egg, evaporated milk, vanilla extract, and melted chocolate to the well.
4. Mix with a spoon until the batter is smooth.
5. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 15 x 10 x 1-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle the chopped walnuts over the batter.
7. Bake in a preheated 400-degree oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
8. Cut the cookies into squares while they are still warm, using a 2-1/2 inch square size.
9. Allow the cookies to cool in the pan before removing them.
